candidates.p: Plaid Cymru - The Party of Wales
candidates.stmt:
I want to make the town a place where more young people and young families choose
to stay, a better place for kids to grow up in, and to give better quality of life for all here.
I want to encourage local businesses and help develop local services, and will support
Plaid Cymru’s pledge to reform business rates and expand childcare.

Dear Resident,
I’m Paul Smith, your truly independent candidate for the vacant Councillor position in Llandrindod South Ward.
I’m standing because I believe residents deserve a councillor who will work solely in their best interests, free from party politics and without having to follow any party line.
I have lived in Llandrindod Wells for 15 years and am a father of three. My two youngest children attend local schools, and I am an active volunteer in our community, giving around 20 hours each month to support my son’s school as a parent governor, PTA volunteer, and reading supporter.
For the past two years, I have served as a Town Councillor, always on a completely voluntary basis, claiming no allowances or expenses. During this time, I helped instigate the Station Crescent toilet refurbishment and new Changing Places facility, supporting disabled residents to remain independent.
Professionally, I am a former Director of Adult Social Care for Herefordshire Council and currently run a successful business from my home on a full-time, flexible basis. My experience across both public service and business gives me a strong understanding of finance, governance, scrutiny, and customer service.
I believe Powys County Council can do better, and I am standing because I want to bring stronger accountability, better decision-making, and better outcomes for local residents.
While I don’t typically use social media, I have created a dedicated Facebook page for this election to make it easier for residents to contact me, discuss local issues, and access my research.
For further information on what I believe is important for our area, please refer to my campaign leaflet below.  Further information is also available on my Facebook page.
I would be delighted to hear from you.
Paul Smith
Your truly independent candidate
